channel.title: Jams on Adrian Lissot's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Jams on Adrian Lissot's Blog

item.title: Github GameOff 2021 - Grand Matrix Reloaded
item.description: Check out my entry to Github GameOff 2021, Grand Matrix Reloaded! Credits: Adrian Lissot, Barthélémy Renucci, Emily Lissot (my sister!).

item.title: js13k-2021 - Space Cowboy
item.description: Check out my entry to js13k 2021, Space Cowboy! Credits: Adrian Lissot, Barthélémy Renucci, Florent Perez.

item.title: MakeCode Arcade - Lost Viking
item.description: Check out my game made using Microsoft MakeCode Arcade, Lost Viking! There’s also a detailed post in the MakeCode’s forum: Forum Post Credits: Adrian Lissot.

item.title: js13k-2020 - 404 BC Pinball
item.description: Check out my entry to js13k 2020, 404 BC Pinball! Credits: Adrian Lissot, Barthélémy Renucci, David Sebaoun, Florent Perez.

item.title: js13k-2019 - Playback
item.description: Check out my entry to js13k 2019, Playback! Credits: Adrian Lissot.
